gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; furthermore, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.
